name: LLM API Logger
description: Logs all LLM API request/response payloads for debugging and auditing

maxFileSizeMb.label: Max File Size (MB)
maxFileSizeMb.help: Max log file size before rotation

maxFiles.label: Max Files
maxFiles.help: Max number of rotated files to keep

redactApiKey.label: Redact API Keys
redactApiKey.help: Redact API keys and sensitive tokens in logs (recommended)

prettyPrint.label: Pretty Print
prettyPrint.help: Pretty print JSON for readability (larger files)
